SE_Order_Organization_AD_Org_ID.description: Set defaults when organization changes (trigger: AD_Org_ID)
SE_Order_Organization_AD_Org_ID.impactIfOmitted: Organization-dependent defaults (warehouse, price list) not auto-set

SL_Order_DocType_C_DocTypeTarget_ID.description: Auto-configure order based on document type selection (trigger: C_DocTypeTarget_ID)
SL_Order_DocType_C_DocTypeTarget_ID.impactIfOmitted: Document type sub-settings not applied automatically

SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate_DateOrdered.description: Propagate order date changes to order lines (trigger: DateOrdered)
SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate_DateOrdered.impactIfOmitted: Line dates would not sync with header date changes

SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate_DatePromised.description: Propagate promised date changes to order lines (trigger: DatePromised)
SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate_DatePromised.impactIfOmitted: Line dates would not sync with header date changes

SL_Order_PriceList_M_PriceList_ID.description: Update currency and tax settings from price list (trigger: M_PriceList_ID)
SL_Order_PriceList_M_PriceList_ID.impactIfOmitted: Currency mismatch and wrong tax settings after price list change

SE_Order_BPartner_C_BPartner_ID.description: Auto-fill address, contact, price list, payment terms from business partner (trigger: C_BPartner_ID)
SE_Order_BPartner_C_BPartner_ID.impactIfOmitted: User must manually set all partner-related fields

SL_Charge_C_Charge_ID.description: Set charge amount and tax when charge selected (trigger: C_Charge_ID)
SL_Charge_C_Charge_ID.impactIfOmitted: Charge lines would lack proper tax and amount

SE_Order_BPartnerLocation_C_BPartner_Loc.description: Update tax zone and delivery info from partner location (trigger: C_BPartner_Location_ID)
SE_Order_BPartnerLocation_C_BPartner_Loc.impactIfOmitted: Tax calculations may use wrong zone after location change

SE_Order_Project_C_Project_ID.impactIfOmitted: Project defaults not populated; minor for simplified UI

SL_Order_Product_M_Product_ID.description: Auto-fill UOM, price, tax, description from product (trigger: M_Product_ID)
SL_Order_Product_M_Product_ID.impactIfOmitted: Critical: product line fields not populated

SL_Order_Amt_QtyOrdered.description: Recalculate line amounts when quantity changes (trigger: QtyOrdered)
SL_Order_Amt_QtyOrdered.impactIfOmitted: Line totals not recalculated after quantity change

SL_Order_Amt_PriceList.description: Recalculate line amounts when list price changes (trigger: PriceList)
SL_Order_Amt_PriceList.impactIfOmitted: Line totals not recalculated after price change

SL_Order_Amt_PriceActual.description: Recalculate line amounts when actual price changes (trigger: PriceActual)
SL_Order_Amt_PriceActual.impactIfOmitted: Line totals not recalculated after price change

SL_Order_Amt_C_Tax_ID.description: Recalculate line amounts when tax changes (trigger: C_Tax_ID)

SL_Order_Charge_Tax_C_Charge_ID.description: Determine tax for charge lines (trigger: C_Charge_ID)
SL_Order_Charge_Tax_C_Charge_ID.impactIfOmitted: Charge lines would have wrong or missing tax

SL_Order_Tax_C_BPartner_Location_ID.description: Recalculate tax when partner location changes on line (trigger: C_BPartner_Location_ID)
SL_Order_Tax_C_BPartner_Location_ID.impactIfOmitted: Tax not updated when delivery address changes

SL_Order_Amt_LineNetAmt.description: Recalculate prices/discount from line net amount (trigger: LineNetAmt)
SL_Order_Amt_LineNetAmt.impactIfOmitted: Reverse price calculation from net amount not working

SL_Order_Amt_Discount.description: Recalculate prices from discount percentage (trigger: Discount)
SL_Order_Amt_Discount.impactIfOmitted: Discount not applied to unit price

SL_Order_Amt_M_AttributeSetInstance_ID.description: Recalculate amounts when attribute set instance changes (trigger: M_AttributeSetInstance_ID)

SL_Order_Conversion_M_Product_Uom_Id.description: Convert between order UOM and base UOM quantities (trigger: M_Product_Uom_Id)

SL_Order_Conversion_QuantityOrder.description: Convert order UOM quantity to base quantity (trigger: QuantityOrder)
SL_Order_Conversion_QuantityOrder.impactIfOmitted: Base quantity not calculated from order UOM entry

SL_Order_Amt_CANCELPRICEAD.description: Recalculate amounts after canceling discounts/promotions (trigger: CANCELPRICEAD)
SL_Order_Amt_CANCELPRICEAD.impactIfOmitted: Amounts not recalculated when promotions canceled

OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_C_Aum.description: Convert operative (alternative) UOM quantity to base quantity (trigger: C_Aum)
OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_C_Aum.impactIfOmitted: Base quantity not calculated from alternative UOM entry

OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_Aumqty.description: Convert operative quantity to base quantity (trigger: Aumqty)
OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_Aumqty.impactIfOmitted: Base quantity not calculated from operative qty entry

SL_Order_Amt_Gross_Unit_Price.description: Recalculate line amounts from gross unit price (trigger: Gross_Unit_Price)

AD_Org_without_star_AD_Org_ID.impactIfOmitted: Users could select the system org (*)

C_BPartner_Location_Ship_To_C_BPartner_L.description: Filter ship-to addresses: only active ShipTo locations for selected partner
